parameters.name: Digital Input-1 Action
parameters.comment: Input-1 if the input source is set as user configured the alarm action function will be activated according to the selection.

parameters.name: Digital Input-1 Arming
parameters.comment: Input-1 if the input source is set as user configured the fault function of the input will be active according to the timing selection.

parameters.name: Digital Input-2 Source
parameters.comment: Input-2 is the parameter for function selection.

parameters.name: Digital Input-2 Polarity
parameters.comment: Input-2 is the parameter for polarity selection.

parameters.name: Digital Input-2 Action
parameters.comment: If the input source is set as user configured the alarm action function will be activated according to the selection.

parameters.name: Digital Input-2 Arming
parameters.comment: If the input source is set as configured by the user the error function of the input will be active according to the timing selection.
